widgets_values: Set the video width and height to values that are multiples of 16.
If you get a Torch error when using this locally, please ignore this node. Also, please ignore this node when using it online.
If you get an 'out of memory' error, enable this node. It can help reduce the pressure on your VRAM. Its maximum value is 40.
If you just want the pose and don't need the background, you can skip this group.

How to use the video upscaler:
Let's use one of my videos as an example. The original video has 616 total frames, a 30 FPS frame rate, and a 480p resolution. I set the batch size to 154 frames, which splits the video into 4 batches of about 5 seconds each. The new resolution is set to 832p. The entire upscaling process goes through 3 loops, and at the end, the 4 batches of images are merged into the new, upscaled video. You can use this example to calculate the right settings for the video you want to upscale.
